summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 5 features: User registration (first user becomes admin), case-insensitive login, TRMM sync with monitoring_type classification, separate /servers and /workstations endpoints, client detail page with tabs, monthly health check with server selection and save functionality, and reclassify devices endpoint. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright.
passed_tests: User Registration - First user automatically becomes admin (role='admin')
User Registration - Email and username stored as lowercase
TRMM Sync - /api/integrations/trmm/sync fetches clients, sites, agents
TRMM Sync - monitoring_type correctly set for each agent
Clients - Returns list with server_count and workstation_count separated
/servers - Returns ONLY servers (monitoring_type=server or null), excludes workstations
Client Detail - GET /api/clients/{id} returns full client info with counts
Client Servers - GET /api/servers?client_id={id} filters by client
Client Workstations - GET /api/workstations?client_id={id} filters by client
Health Checks - POST /api/health-checks saves new health check record
Reclassify - POST /api/trmm/reclassify updates monitoring_type from TRMM

user_registration.first_user_admin: First registered user gets role='admin' regardless of requested role
user_registration.case_insensitive_storage: Email and username stored lowercase for case-insensitive matching

login.username_login: Can login with username in email field (case-insensitive)

trmm_sync.monitoring_type: Correctly set as 'server' or 'workstation' from TRMM API

servers_workstations_separation./servers: Returns only devices with monitoring_type=server or null (57 total)
servers_workstations_separation.client_counts: server_count and workstation_count shown separately on client cards

client_detail_page.servers_tab: Shows servers for client with correct filtering
client_detail_page.workstations_tab: Shows workstations for client with device info

health_check_page.server_selection: Dropdown with 57 servers from TRMM (hostname + client name)
health_check_page.ad_detection: Auto-detects Domain Controllers and adds AD-specific checks
health_check_page.save_functionality: Health check saves successfully to database

reclassify_endpoint.function: Updates monitoring_type from TRMM for all devices

critical_code_review_comments: TRMM sync correctly classifies agents by monitoring_type
/servers and /workstations endpoints properly filter by monitoring_type
Client detail page displays separate counts for servers and workstations
Health check page allows server selection and save functionality works
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5_features.py - New comprehensive test file for Iteration 5

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Clients list, Client detail with tabs, Health Check page all verified)

seed_data_creation: Test user created (admin@test.com), TRMM sync executed (42 clients, 52 sites, 527 agents)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features all working: User registration with first-user-admin logic, case-insensitive login, TRMM sync with monitoring_type classification, /servers and /workstations endpoints properly separated, client detail page with tabs showing correct counts, monthly health check page with server selection and save. Test credentials: admin@test.com / Test123!. TRMM data synced with 42 clients, 57 servers, workstations from TRMM API.
